title: ProjectBase
content:
# ProjectBase

Inherits from: ProjectMixin, abc.ABC


Project representation
Contains the structure to create the app file tree and templates based on the AppType and AppFlavour


## Methods


### get_flavour() -> ApplicationFlavour


### get_flavour_class() -> Type[ProjectFileTree]


### create_dirs_and_files() -> None

Creates the directory tree and the files for each one


### get_template_parameters() -> Dict

Dict used to fill the templates
summary: Project representation Contains the structure to create the app file tree and templates based on the AppType and AppFlavour
